_publications._publicationTitle: RABL6A Regulates Schwann Cell Senescence in an RB1-Dependent Manner.

_contextSnippet: A concomitant induction of senescence-associated β-galactosidase (SA-βgal) was also observed...low passage NHSCs depleted of RABL6A displayed a significant upregulation of SA-βgal staining
details: Successfully detected concomitant induction of senescence-associated β-galactosidase in passaged NHSCs and significant upregulation in RABL6A-depleted cells
